name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-1
title: tdd-subagent not published to .claude/agents/ — missing build script entry and Stop-hook drift detection
description: tdd-subagent is a standalone feature but is not registered as a Claude-supported subagent type under .claude/agents/. Issues: (1) dispatch-tdd-subagent.py assembles a prompt but there is no .claude/agents/tdd-subagent/ agent definition that rabbit-feature-touch or any skill can call by name. (2) The build script (build-contract.json) does not publish the agent definition on build. (3) The Stop hook (sync-check.py / drift detection) does not check for content drift between the feature source and the deployed .claude/agents/ copy. Fix: add agent definition to feature, add publish step to build-contract.json, add drift check on Stop consistent with how skills are drift-detected.

history.note: Created .claude/agents/tdd-subagent.md agent definition, added copy-file entry to build-contract.json with check_on_stop: true for drift detection, added structural tests.
